# testing/utility/tool-response.utility

Helpers for creating and parsing MCP ToolTextResponse objects in tests.

## Functions

| Function                                                          | Description                                                                    |
| ----------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| [createToolTextResponse](functions/createToolTextResponse.md)     | Creates a ToolTextResponse wrapping the given text in the MCP content format.  |
| [parseFirstToolTextAsJson](functions/parseFirstToolTextAsJson.md) | Extracts and JSON-parses the first text content block from a ToolTextResponse. |
